entry.title: New: RES25-310 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF EQUIPMENT AND ENRICHMENT ITEMS, VALUED AT $20,471.62, TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR EIGHT SOLID ROLLER BALLS; A NEW SUPPORT LEG FOR THE PLAYGROUND SLIDE; AND A PATZ HAY CHOPPER.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
